Home › Programmes › Diploma in Medical Imaging
Diploma Programme

Diploma in
Medical Imaging

The 3-year Diploma in Medical Imaging at DIT produces Allied Healthcare professionals such as clinical radiographers. Students are trained in anatomy, patient positioning, examination techniques, equipment protocols, radiation safety and protection, and may specialize in CT, MRI, mammography, ultrasounds, nuclear medicine, and angiography.

3 Years (Full Time) Intake: May & September
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Course Code: DMI MQA: MQA/FA 4965 MOHE: KPT/JPS(R725/4/0074) HRDF Claimable International ✓

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital
  • ✓ Practical placements at approved hospitals

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Guaranteed Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years of Excellence — Affiliated with the established Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Local Students

SPM or equivalent with FIVE (5) Credits including: Mathematics; ONE (1) science subject (Biology / Physics / Chemistry / General Science / Applied Science); and any THREE (3) other subjects — with Pass in Bahasa Malaysia and English
OR GCE / O Level or equivalent with 5 Grade C including: Mathematics; ONE (1) science subject (Biology / Physics / Chemistry / General Science / Applied Science); and any THREE (3) other subjects — with Pass in Bahasa Malaysia or English
OR Certificate related to Health Sciences with minimum CGPA 2.75

International Students

GCE / O Level or equivalent with 5 Grade C including: Mathematics; ONE (1) science subject; and THREE (3) other subjects — with Pass in Bahasa Malaysia or English
OR Certificate related to Health Sciences with minimum CGPA 2.75

About This Programme

The 3-year Diploma in Medical Imaging at DIT produces Allied Healthcare professionals such as clinical radiographers. Students are trained in anatomy, patient positioning, examination techniques, equipment protocols, radiation safety and protection, and may specialize in CT, MRI, mammography, ultrasounds, nuclear medicine, and angiography.

Course Modules

1Semester 1

  • Anatomy and Physiology I
  • Imaging Instrumentation I
  • General Physics
  • Imaging Process I
  • Patient Care & Ethics I
  • Advanced Communicative English
  • Islamic / Moral Studies

2Semester 2

  • Anatomy and Physiology II
  • Basic Imaging Technique I
  • Patient Care and Ethics II
  • Radiation Protection
  • Radiation Physics & Behavioral Science
  • Penghayatan Etika dan Peradaban
  • Pathology

3Semester 3

  • Radiographic and Sectional Anatomy
  • Image Evaluation
  • Imaging Instrumentation II
  • Basic Imaging Technique II
  • Clinical Placement I

4Semester 4

  • Clinical Placement II & III
  • Special Imaging Technique
  • Contrast Imaging Technique

5Semester 5

  • Special Imaging Modality
  • Kursus Integriti dan Antirasuah
  • Healthcare Management
  • Professional Development
  • Khidmat Masyarakat
  • Computed Tomography

6Semester 6

  • Clinical Placement IV
  • Clinical Placement V

Career Prospects

RadiographerMedical Imaging TechnologistRadiation Protection OfficerApplication Specialist (Medical Equipment)

Future Education Pathways

→Diploma → Degree in Medical Imaging
→Degree → Master in Radiology / Medical Physics
